Identity.Name: StingDrawingPurposes
Identity.Definition: Purpose taxonomy for the STING Drawing Type registry. Every DrawingType profile carries one of these as its 'purpose' field; the value drives view-type selection, slot defaults, view-template / view-style-pack routing, and routing-rule fallback. Mirrors the purposes used across the 90 corporate drawing types (Phase 184e).

Governance.StandardsBasis: STING Drawing Template Manager (Phase 113); Phase 184d–f closed-form drawing-type catalogue

Value.Definition: Floor plan view — horizontal cut through the storey.
Reflected Ceiling Plan — view looking up at ceiling fixtures + grid.
Vertical section — building cut showing storey relationships.
External or internal elevation — orthographic view of vertical surface.
Construction detail — close-up of junction / interface, typically A3.
Tabular schedule — door / window / equipment / room / panel / finishes list.
Fabrication spool drawing — single pipe / duct / electrical assembly with cut list + isometric.
Coordination view — multi-discipline overlay showing clash zones + service routing.
Legend drawing — symbol key, line styles, abbreviations, hatching index.
Clarification drawing — RFI sketch, markup, design-intent narrative. Carries clarification-pack styling.
Schematic / single-line / riser — non-scale logical diagram.
Site plan — external works, drainage, levels, vehicle access.
Roof plan — falls, outlets, plant location.
Electrical / MEP riser diagram — vertical building-wide single-line.
Reinforcement detail — bar bending schedules, layout drawings.
Client-facing presentation drawing — rendered, full-bleed, narrative-driven.
